creator: lantw44@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 156065
Fix Xen text console issue

virt-manager cannot access Xen text console because of a non-needed check. It is the same problem as the comment https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=199108#c1.

This problem has been fixed by the upstream. It is nice to have the patch in our ports. https://git.fedorahosted.org/cgit/virt-manager.git/commit/?id=0aeee5c449d608d75f5632e9aa47f5e433eb3879
